rounds.goal: Validate the product promise, user motivation, and major workflow confusion before implementation hardens.
rounds.exit_criteria: The core value proposition is understandable, the top workflow is coherent, and no blocker-level confusion remains.

rounds.goal: Validate the implemented slice, log usability failures, and confirm that acceptance criteria hold under real tasks.
rounds.exit_criteria: No P0-P1 workflow blockers remain, the key task succeeds consistently, and top feedback themes are stable enough to cluster.

rounds.participant_mode: mixed internal and trusted external users
rounds.goal: Pressure-test stability, messaging, and operational readiness before broader rollout.
rounds.exit_criteria: Feedback severity is trending down, repeated blocker classes are closed, and rollout readiness can be judged with explicit evidence.
